## Checklist
- [ ] **One entry per PR** (keeps review fast)
- [ ] `id` is unique and lowercase (letters/digits/dashes)
- [ ] `cat`, `tier` and `auth.t` use allowed values (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] `tier` is honest — `free` / `freemium` / `paid`
- [ ] `docs` is a live URL; `quota` states the real free-tier limit
- [ ] `use` is one plain sentence (no marketing copy)
- [ ] Ran `node validate.mjs` locally and it passed
